fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Bill-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer that you sent the invoice to.

fields.name: Bill-to Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the customer that you send or sent the invoice or credit memo to.

fields.name: Bill-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address that you sent the invoice to.

fields.name: Bill-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies the extended address that you sent the invoice to.

fields.name: Bill-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the customer on the sales document.

fields.name: Bill-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the person you regularly contact at the customer to whom you sent the invoice.

fields.name: Ship-to Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for an alternate shipment address if you want to ship to another address than the one that has been entered automatically. This field is also used in case of drop shipment.

fields.name: Ship-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer that you delivered the items to.

fields.name: Ship-to Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the the name of the customer that you delivered the items to.

fields.name: Ship-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address that you delivered the items to.

fields.name: Ship-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies the extended address that you delivered the items to.

fields.name: Ship-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the customer on the sales document.

fields.name: Ship-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person at the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the shipment was posted.

fields.name: Shipment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when items on the document are shipped or were shipped. A shipment date is usually calculated from a requested delivery date plus lead time.

fields.name: Shipment Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shipment method for the shipment.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location from where inventory items to the customer on the sales document are to be shipped by default.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code of the shipment.

fields.name: Salesperson Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which salesperson is associated with the shipment.

fields.name: Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the sales order that this invoice was posted from.

fields.name: No. Printed
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many times the document has been printed.

fields.name: Sell-to Customer Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer.

fields.name: Sell-to Customer Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the customer who will receive the products and be billed by default.

fields.name: Sell-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's sell-to address.

fields.name: Sell-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's extended sell-to address.

fields.name: Sell-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the customer on the sales document.

fields.name: Sell-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact at the customer's sell-to address.

fields.name: Bill-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the post code of the customer's bill-to address.

fields.name: Bill-to County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province or county as a part of the address.

fields.name: Bill-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the customer's billing address.

fields.name: Sell-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code of the customer's main address.

fields.name: Sell-to County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province or county as a part of the address.

fields.name: Sell-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region of the customer on the sales document.

fields.name: Ship-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the post code of the customer's ship-to address.

fields.name: Ship-to County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province or county as a part of the address.

fields.name: Ship-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date of the document.

fields.name: External Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number that the customer uses in their own system to refer to this sales document.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the shipping agent who is transporting the items.

fields.name: Package Tracking No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shipping agent's package number.

fields.name: Quote No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the sales quote document if a quote was used to start the sales process.

fields.name: Ship-to Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the telephone number of the company's shipping address.

fields.name: Sell-to Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact number.

fields.name: Bill-to Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact person at the customer's bill-to address.

fields.name: Responsibility Center
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the responsibility center that serves the customer on this sales document.

fields.name: Requested Delivery Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that the customer has asked for the order to be delivered.

fields.name: Promised Delivery Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that you have promised to deliver the order, as a result of the Order Promising function.

fields.name: Shipping Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies how long it takes from when the items are shipped from the warehouse to when they are delivered.

fields.name: Outbound Whse. Handling Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies a date formula for the time it takes to get items ready to ship from this location. The time element is used in the calculation of the delivery date as follows: Shipment Date + Outbound Warehouse Handling Time = Planned Shipment Date + Shipping Time = Planned Delivery Date.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Service Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the service, such as a one-day delivery, that is offered by the shipping agent.
